name: Rook
species: Unknown (passes as Human — something is slightly off)
sd_appearance: A towering figure, taller than most humans, with an unremarkable face and forgettable features, clad in silver and white armor adorned with blue accents and arena medals. Their skin is a weathered shade of gray, their hair a dark, matted mass that hangs down to their shoulders, and their eyes a piercing ice-blue that stand out against their dark complexion. A warhammer and crossbow are visible on their person, worn with a worn leather and chainmail outfit that tells tales of past contracts. Their most distinctive visual detail is a peculiar, glowing aura that seems to emanate from their being, casting an eerie light around them, hinting at their unknown species.
faction_visual: silver and white armour with blue accents, arena medals, theatrical presence
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
